notes: Core sqlite-vec virtual table for KNN search. Turso lacks loadExtension and vec0 — blocks vector search entirely.
LoadExtension API for sqlite-vec. Turso (Rust) has no loadExtension — must reimplement vector search natively or via external service.
better-sqlite3 .pragma() API used for WAL, busy_timeout, foreign_keys, cache_size, mmap_size, synchronous, wal_autocheckpoint, temp_store. Turso has different pragma interface.
Multi-database ATTACH/DETACH for per-embedder shard isolation. Turso libSQL has different attach semantics and may not support cross-file attach.
sqlite-vec distance function for KNN queries. Must be reimplemented if Turso lacks vec extension support.
Per-dimension blob tables (e.g. vec_768) for fallback storage. Naming convention must be preserved during migration.
FTS5 virtual table for BM25 full-text search. Turso lacks FTS5 — must use external search engine or Turso's native text search.
FTS5 bm25() ranking function with per-column weights. No equivalent in Turso — requires external BM25 implementation.
FTS5 sync triggers for insert/update/delete. Turso triggers may have different behavior; FTS5 itself must be replaced first.
Metadata table storing embedding dim/provider/model per shard. Schema is portable but lives in attached shard database.
Migration uses ATTACH DATABASE, vec0 virtual table recreation, and VACUUM. All three need Turso-compatible equivalents.
Used to inspect attached databases for shard management. Turso's pragma interface differs from SQLite.
Temp views and INSTEAD OF triggers for legacy compatibility aliases. Turso temp object support may differ.
Integrity check pragma used for corruption detection. Turso has different integrity verification mechanisms.
Reindex writes to staging shard then atomically renames. Uses vec0 virtual table creation inside shard. Migration must preserve atomic swap semantics.
Explicit WAL TRUNCATE checkpoint before close for corruption prevention. Turso has different WAL/checkpoint semantics.
Partial unique index with COALESCE expressions and WHERE predicate. Turso should support this but needs validation.
Five pragma calls on attached vector shard; Turso lacks .pragma() and ATTACH — entire shard initialization must be redesigned

ATTACH/DETACH for vector shard separation; Turso has no ATTACH DATABASE — shard architecture requires rework

Eight pragma calls at startup; most are unsupported in Turso — need abstraction layer or removal
Transaction-wrapped merge of checkpoint catalog from backup; INSERT OR IGNORE — Turso supports basic transactions but no ATTACH for the backup source
Creates vec0 virtual table in attached shard and copies rows — Turso has no vec0, no ATTACH, no loadExtension
All 37 schema migrations wrapped in one atomic transaction; Turso supports transactions but migration DDL may hit unsupported features

FTS5 sync triggers (insert/update/delete) — dependent on FTS5 which Turso lacks; needs alternative sync mechanism

Full table rebuild to enforce CHECK constraint; Turso may handle this differently — verify ALTER TABLE RENAME and rebuild compatibility
Deletes from vec0 virtual table in attached schema; blocked by Turso's lack of vec0 and ATTACH
Transaction-wrapped vec0 virtual table writes (delete+insert per row) — blocks Turso migration entirely
